allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/tailwind/package.json'\); console.log\('tailwind pkg:', p.version, p.description\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('./node_modules/lucide-react/dist/cjs/lucide-react.js'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /gram|twitter|linked|social/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.slice\(0,20\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('created:', d.get\('key'\), d.get\('target'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const lib = require\('radix-ui'\); console.log\('Slot' in lib ? 'Found Slot' : 'Slot not found'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lib\); console.log\('All exports:', keys.length\); const slotLike = keys.filter\(k => k.includes\('Slot'\)\); console.log\('Slot-like exports:', slotLike\);")

Bash(node -e "const { Slot } = require\('radix-ui'\); console.log\('Slot type:', typeof Slot\); console.log\('Slot keys:', Object.keys\(Slot\)\); console.log\('Slot.Root:', typeof Slot.Root\); console.log\('Slot properties:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Slot\)\);")
Bash(node -e "try { const Slot = require\('@radix-ui/react-slot'\); console.log\('Slot from @radix-ui/react-slot:', Object.keys\(Slot\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Error:', e.message\); }")
